prompt: hey can you check our i18n files in client/i18n/ ? I think we're missing some translations in Italian and Occitan. If there are missing keys, suggest some translations and I'll validate them before you apply the changes.

assertions.name: detects_all_missing_keys
assertions.description: Should detect missing keys in both Italian (2 keys) and Occitan (2 keys)

assertions.name: language_appropriate_suggestions
assertions.description: Should propose translations that are linguistically appropriate for each target language (Italian vs Occitan)

assertions.name: handles_multiple_languages
assertions.description: Should handle both languages systematically, not just one

assertions.name: interactive_per_key
assertions.description: Should present each missing key interactively for validation before applying

assertions.name: updates_both_files
assertions.description: Should correctly update both it.json and oc.json with validated translations

assertions.name: preserves_structure_both
assertions.description: Both updated files should maintain proper JSON structure and UTF-8 encoding

assertions.name: final_verification
assertions.description: Should verify that all translations are complete after updates
